parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "name": "{{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.name || 'Unknown' }}",
  "type": "Residential",
  "status": "Open",
  "source": "Harmonia - {{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.source }}",
  "priority": "{{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.scoring.isEmergency ? 'Urgent' : 'Normal' }}",
  "address": {
    "street": "{{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.address || '' }}",
    "city": "{{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.city || '' }}",
    "state": "{{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.state || '' }}",
    "zip": "{{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.zip || '' }}"
  },
  "notes": "HARMONIA SCORE: {{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.scoring.score }}/100 ({{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.scoring.tier }})\n\nNotes: {{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.notes }}\nSource: {{ $('Calculate Lead Score').item.json.source }}"
}
